baseline_identity.note: target identity artifact does not match the expected target surface

clean_execution_surface.note: non-git execution surface exists and is explicitly observed

artifact_viability.note: artifact path parent exists and is writable by convention

helper_integrity.note: helper integrity not required for this level

credential_surface.note: credential surface not required for this level

prompt_task_identity.note: exact prompt and task identity are present

recommended_next_safe_step: restore the trusted baseline and expected target-surface identity
